basic_details.job_title: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Warangal (NIT Warangal) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 05-07-2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age relaxation as per norms.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E./ B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering/ Production /Manufacturing/Aerospace Engineering with ME/M.Tech in Manufacturing/ Computer Integrated/Materials science any other relevant discipline.
qualification.details: B.E./ B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering/ Production /Manufacturing/Aerospace Engineering with ME/M.Tech in Manufacturing/ Computer Integrated/Materials science any other relevant discipline.

salary_details.details: Rs. 31000 - 37000 Per Month Rs. 37,000 + HRA / month (With GATE Qualification)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the NIT Warangal Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 05-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: NIT Warangal Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Warangal JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Junior Research Fellow position at NIT Warangal is 05-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a B.E./B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering/Production/Manufacturing/Aerospace Engineering with an ME/M.Tech in Manufacturing/Computer Integrated/Materials Science or a related discipline.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 30 years, with age relaxation provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The salary for the Junior Research Fellow position ranges from Rs. 31,000 to Rs. 37,000 per month, with an additional Rs. 37,000 + HRA per month for candidates with GATE qualification.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NIT Warangal JRF vacancy?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted via email. You need to prepare your application with all required details and documents and send it to the official email address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an interview, which can be conducted either online or offline.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required to be attached with the application?
faq.answer: You need to attach self-attested copies of your educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contractual position for a Junior Research Fellow at NIT Warangal.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.
